RUNESMITH2-AETUS.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] an [gold]Aetus[/gold] Rune with {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-AETUS.title: Aetus
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] an [gold]Albus[/gold] Rune with {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS.title: Albus
RUNESMITH2-BACKUP_BATTERY.title: Backup Battery
RUNESMITH2-CHISEL_STAB.title: Chisel Stab
RUNESMITH2-CHROMA_CHISEL.title: Chroma Chisel
RUNESMITH2-COMPLETE_CIRCUIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Give all Runes {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold] for each enemy hit.
RUNESMITH2-COMPLETE_CIRCUIT.title: Complete Circuit
RUNESMITH2-CURTAIN_OF_FLAMES.title: Curtain of Flames
RUNESMITH2-DEFEND_RUNESMITH.title: Defend
RUNESMITH2-DOUBLE_UP.title: Double Up
RUNESMITH2-DRY_ICE.title: Dry Ice
RUNESMITH2-EARTH_SHIELD.title: Earth Shield
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROMAGNET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card with [gold]Enhance[/gold] or [gold]Stasis[/gold] from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROMAGNET.selectionScreen: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROMAGNET.title: Electromagnet
RUNESMITH2-EMPOWERMENT.description:
Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equals to your {elements:rs2Icon(ignis)}.
Gain [gold]Brace[/gold] equals to your {elements:rs2Icon(terra)}.
Gain [gold]Amp[/gold] equals to your {elements:rs2Icon(aqua)}.
Lose {elements:rs2Icon(all,1)}.
RUNESMITH2-EMPOWERMENT.title: Empowerment
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Flamma[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA.title: Flamma
RUNESMITH2-FLOWSTATE.title: Flowstate
RUNESMITH2-FLUMEN.title: Flumen
RUNESMITH2-FORTIFY.title: Fortify
RUNESMITH2-FROZEN_CHISEL.title: Frozen Chisel
RUNESMITH2-FULGOR.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Fulgor[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-FULGOR.title: Fulgor
RUNESMITH2-GELID_CANISTER.title: Gelid Canister
RUNESMITH2-GLACIES.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Glacies[/gold] Rune with {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-GLACIES.title: Glacies
RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
{GrindstonePower:plural:This turn|For {GrindstonePower:diff()} turns}, whenever you play a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it. If the card cannot be [gold]Upgraded[/gold], [gold]Enhance[/gold] it instead.
RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE.title: Grindstone
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_AND_CHISEL.description:
Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]|}[gold]Hammer[/gold] card and a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]|}[gold]Chisel[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
They cost 1 less this combat.
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_AND_CHISEL.title: Hammer and Chisel
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_SWING.title: Hammer Swing
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_TORNADO.title: Hammer Tornado
RUNESMITH2-HEAT_EXCHANGE.description:
Deal {CalculationBase} damage to ALL enemies.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each of your {Ignis:rs2Icon(,0)}.
Lose {Ignis:rs2Icon()}.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
RUNESMITH2-HEAT_EXCHANGE.title: Heat Exchange
RUNESMITH2-HIT_AND_RUN.title: Hit and Run
RUNESMITH2-HOT_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enhance[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}{EnhanceBy:plural:| by {EnhanceBy:diff()}} at random.
RUNESMITH2-HOT_HAMMER.title: Hot Hammer
RUNESMITH2-HUNKER_DOWN.title: Hunker Down
RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] an [gold]Incendium[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM.title: Incendium
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Magma[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA.title: Magma
RUNESMITH2-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Break[/gold] your oldest Rune to gain {Block:diff()} more [gold]Block[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.title: Makeshift Armor
RUNESMITH2-METAL_FORMING.title: Metal Forming
RUNESMITH2-MOLTEN_CHISEL.title: Molten Chisel
RUNESMITH2-MORBUS.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Morbus[/gold] Rune with {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-MORBUS.title: Morbus
RUNESMITH2-MUNDUS.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Mundus[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-MUNDUS.title: Mundus
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] an {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}[gold]Origo[/gold] Rune with {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO.title: Origo
RUNESMITH2-OVERLOAD.description:
Give your oldest Rune {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].
If it has at least {Threshold} [gold]Charges[/gold], trigger its passive ability for each [gold]Charge[/gold] and [gold]Break[/gold] it.
RUNESMITH2-OVERLOAD.title: Overload
RUNESMITH2-PRISM.title: Prism
RUNESMITH2-QUICK_CHARGE.description: Give your oldest [gold]Rune[/gold] {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold] and trigger its passive ability.
RUNESMITH2-QUICK_CHARGE.title: Quick Charge
RUNESMITH2-RUNE_HURL.description:
[gold]Break[/gold] your oldest Rune to deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you don't have any Runes, draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
RUNESMITH2-RUNE_HURL.title: Rune Hurl
RUNESMITH2-SAXUM.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Saxum[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-SAXUM.title: Saxum
RUNESMITH2-SHIFTING_HAMMER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. [gold]Enhance[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} by the number of unblocked hits.
RUNESMITH2-SHIFTING_HAMMER.title: Shifting Hammer
RUNESMITH2-SHINING_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enhance[/gold] ALL your other [gold]Hammer[/gold] cards{EnhanceBy:plural:| by {EnhanceBy:diff()}}
RUNESMITH2-SHINING_HAMMER.title: Shining Hammer
RUNESMITH2-STABILIZE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Set the [gold]Charge[/gold] of all Runes to {Charge:diff()}.
RUNESMITH2-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
RUNESMITH2-STATIC_CAGE.title: Static Cage
RUNESMITH2-STEAMING_CHISEL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain {Ignis:rs2Icon()} and {Aqua:rs2Icon()}.
RUNESMITH2-STEAMING_CHISEL.title: Steaming Chisel
RUNESMITH2-STRIKE_RUNESMITH.title: Strike
RUNESMITH2-VULCANUS.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a [gold]Vulcanus[/gold] Rune with {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold] and {Charge:diff()} [gold]Charge{Charge:plural:|s}[/gold].{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-VULCANUS.title: Vulcanus
RUNESMITH2-WILDFIRE.description: At the start of your turn, gain {WildfirePower:rs2Icon(ignis)} and {WildfirePower:rs2Icon(terra)}.
RUNESMITH2-WILDFIRE.title: Wildfire
